en: What grammar and vocabulary do you need to know
to say that you are at a C1 level of English?
That's the advanced level of English.
When you reach B2, you are said to be fluent in English.
But C1 is fluency with a deep understanding of the nuances of the English language.
At C1, you take most of the grammar you already know from B2,
and you learn about more specific and advanced applications.
The grammatical nuances. If you would like to fully know and understand
all of the grammar points and all of the vocabulary points that you need to know to reach C1,
I have created a free C1 ebook.
This ebook is an amazing study plan for you, and I've also included the curriculum
for my new C1 course, which launches on the 15th of May.
To download the C1 ebook and join the waiting list for my C1 programme,
click on the link in the pinned comment.
